name: calendar
description: Create, inspect, update, schedule, and clean up Anybox Calendar todos and events through a local MCP server.

interface.longDescription: A local Anybox Calendar plugin that lets the agent create, inspect, update, schedule, complete, cancel, delete, and search local Calendar todos and events.

mcpServers.name: Calendar
mcpServers.description: Manage Anybox Calendar todos/events and list Calendar items.
permissions: Reads Calendar items from the local Anybox Agent API.
Creates and updates Calendar todos and events in the local Anybox data store after approval.
Can delete Calendar todos and events after approval.

tools.name: calendar_update_source
tools.title: Update Calendar Source
tools.description: Update a Calendar source's name, color, subtitle, or enabled state.

tools.name: calendar_list_items
tools.title: List Calendar Items
tools.description: List projected Anybox Calendar items in an optional time range.

tools.name: calendar_get_item
tools.title: Get Calendar Item
tools.description: Find a Calendar item by item id, event id, or todo/task entity id.

tools.name: calendar_list_todos
tools.title: List Calendar Todos
tools.description: List raw Calendar todos, including unscheduled todos.

tools.name: calendar_schedule_todo
tools.title: Schedule Calendar Todo
tools.description: Schedule, reschedule, or unschedule a Calendar todo.

tools.name: calendar_complete_todo
tools.title: Complete Calendar Todo
tools.description: Mark a Calendar todo as done.

tools.name: calendar_cancel_event
tools.title: Cancel Calendar Event
tools.description: Mark a Calendar event as canceled without deleting it.

tools.name: calendar_find_free_time
tools.title: Find Calendar Free Time
tools.description: Find free windows inside a time range.

installReview: Runs a local Node.js MCP server bundled with Anybox.
Uses the local Anybox Agent Calendar API.
Create, update, complete, cancel, schedule, and delete actions are configured to ask before execution.
